name: paragony
description: A receipt scanning app powered by Google Gemini AI. Upload photos of receipts and get structured, editable data extracted automatically — item names, prices, discounts, and totals. Features a color-coded flagging system for organizing items.

images.alt: Screenshot of the Paragony app's scan result view
Screenshot of the Webflow Library project's website

name: timeline
description: A simple tool for visualizing a Github repository's activity. It allows you to see your activity in a timeline format, providing a quick overview of selected commit.

images.alt: Screenshot of the Github Timeline project's website

name: derry
description: Virtual guide for the City of Derry created as part of an Erasmus project in Northern Ireland. It gained a very positive reviewer and local community acclaim.

images.alt: Screenshot of the Derry Guide project's website

name: polyform
description: A Google Forms alike tool for creating forms and reviewing results. Designed with simplicity in mind.
Besides a sleek-looking front end, I also created an extensive API server featuring data safety and limitation checks.

images.alt: Screenshot of the PolyForm project's website
